lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What brings you all the way out into the Wilderness?

lines.speaker: Zamorakian Acolyte
lines.text: Not the hunt for other beings! The hunt for knowledge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Knowledge? Can't say I've seen much of that around here. In case you didn't notice, it's all ruins.

lines.speaker: Zamorakian Acolyte
lines.text: Maybe for someone like you, but to us followers of Zamorak, there's relics of his mighty power everywhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Isn't it a little dangerous to be looking for knowledge out here?

lines.speaker: Zamorakian Acolyte
lines.text: That doesn't bother us. Our lord will protect us, we hunt in service of him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a lot calmer than the other Zamorakian followers I've come across in the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't think you'll find much in these ruins.

lines.speaker: Zamorakian Acolyte
lines.text: Be that as it may, it is our duty to honour our god and hunt for knowledge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it then.

lines.speaker: Zamorakian Acolyte
lines.text: All power to the almighty Zamorak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I take it you're with the others dressed in red.

lines.speaker: Zamorakian Acolyte
lines.text: We are here in service of the only true god.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it then.
